text:
- [escalation] GitHub: GitHub personal access token 'jeeves3' expires in about 5 hours.
- [escalation] GitHub: GitHub personal access token 'jeevesagain' expires in about 5 hours.
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub Actions workflow 'Loop Monitor' failed in jeeves-unchained repository.
- [escalation] lang.mc@gmail.com: System alert about 3 loop-monitor alerts from Mister Lang's own account, flagged as most pressing matter.
- [reply needed] Vervaeke Foundation: Vervaeke Foundation outreach about a dialogue on meaning-making.
- [decision required] David Purdy: GitHub invitation to collaborate on the 5mts/electup repository.
- [decision required] David Purdy: GitHub invitation to collaborate on the 5mts/map-sniffer repository.
- [decision required] David Purdy: GitHub invitation to collaborate on the 5mts/electup-embed repository.
- [decision required] David Purdy: GitHub invitation to collaborate on the 5mts/tahoma repository.
- [decision required] Google Play: Google One subscription suspended due to declined payment; requires payment method update to reactivate.
- [no action] TurboTax Monthly: TurboTax marketing email about rising costs and tips.
- [no action] lang.mc@gmail.com: Daily correspondence summary from Jeeves system for May 28, 2026.
